title: Whirlwind (disambiguation)
content:
'''Whirlwind''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Whirlwind (pilot)|Whirlwind]]''', a [[First Order]] [[pilot]]
*'''[[Whirlwind (Chiss)|''Whirlwind'']]''', a [[Chiss Ascendancy]] [[starship]]
*'''[[Whirlwind of Destiny]]''', a [[lightsaber combat]] technique

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Starships===
*'''[[Whirlwind (Chiss)/Legends|''Whirlwind'']]''', a [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]]
*'''[[Whirlwind (Imperial-class)|''Whirlwind'']]''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''[[Whirlwind (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Whirlwind'']]''', an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]]

===Other===
*The '''[[Whirlwind (species)|Whirlwinds]]''', a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]
*'''[[Telekinesis/Legends#Applications of telekinesis deriving from uses of Force Push|Force Whirlwind]]'''
*'''[[Whirlwind of Destiny/Legends|Whirlwind of Destiny]]'''
